component.name: CardVertical
component.description: A vertical course card with an image thumbnail, optional progress bar, serif title, and metadata row (duration and certified badge). Two image proportions via the size prop: lg uses a portrait 4/5 thumbnail (tall), sm uses a landscape 3/2 thumbnail (short). Used in Saved Courses and Discover carousels. No dark variant — appears on light and elevated backgrounds only.

when: Displaying course cards in a horizontal carousel (Discover, Saved Courses sections)
Use size='lg' (portrait thumbnail) for feature carousels where image impact matters
Use size='sm' (landscape thumbnail) for compact carousels or narrower layout slots
Pass progress when the user has started the course — renders a ProgressBar between image and title

patterns.name: discover-carousel
patterns.description: A horizontal row of large CardVertical cards in the Discover section, paginated by PaginationArrows.

patterns.name: saved-courses-carousel
patterns.description: A horizontal row of compact CardVertical cards showing in-progress saved courses.
patterns.tree: Box > Inline(gap=md, wrap=false) > [CardVertical(size=sm, progress=65), CardVertical(size=sm, progress=20), ...]

antiPatterns.scenario: Mixing CardVertical and CardHorizontal in the same list
antiPatterns.reason: Inconsistent layout direction breaks visual rhythm.
antiPatterns.alternative: Pick one orientation per context: CardVertical for carousel grids, CardHorizontal for compact lists.

antiPatterns.reason: Creates doubled surface depth that loses hierarchy meaning.
antiPatterns.alternative: Place CardVertical directly in an Inline or Box layout container.

antiPatterns.reason: The serif title and course metadata row are designed for course items specifically.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Card with a custom inner layout for other content types.

antiPatterns.scenario: Mixing CardVertical and CardHorizontal in the same carousel or grid row
antiPatterns.reason: CardVertical uses portrait or landscape thumbnails; CardHorizontal uses a fixed square thumbnail. Mixing them produces inconsistent heights and visual noise.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use CardVertical for carousel and discover layouts; use CardHorizontal for list and search layouts. Never mix the two in the same visual row.

purpose.lg: Portrait thumbnail (aspectRatio 4/5) — tall image suited for feature carousels and Discover sections.
purpose.sm: Landscape thumbnail (aspectRatio 3/2) — shorter image suited for compact carousels or narrower slots.

states.description: Static display card — full image opacity.
Image thumbnail fades to 0.8 opacity on card hover.
ProgressBar renders between image and title when the progress prop is provided.
No thumbnailSrc provided — Image component renders a neutral grey placeholder with a centred icon.

ariaAttributes: thumbnailAlt — pass a meaningful description of the course image, or empty string if the title already provides sufficient context.
